titles.title: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2027
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2027
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2027
Making appropriations for the Departments of Commerce and Justice, Science, and Related Agencies for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2027, and for other purposes.

action.text: The House Committee on Appropriations reported an original measure, H. Rept. 119-652, by Mr. Rogers (KY).

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 567.
